verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mualsang dawnte en in la, amaute tungah kong thupiak gen in

Topa Pasian ahi keimah in mual liante, mual neute, guam thukte, kuampite kiangah ka gen ding thute, Israel minamte in a ngaihna ding uh gen in. Mite in milim a biakna munte a vatgawp dingin namsau khat kong kuansak ding hi
Biakna taute kiphelkek ding a, paknamtui taute kisatkham ding hi. Tua lai-ah a om mi khempeuh kithatin, a milimte uh' mai-ah kipaithang gawp ding hi
Israel misi luanghawmte ka thehthang gawp ding a, a guhte uh biakna tau kiimah ka lawnthang gawp ding hi

Israel khuapite khempeuh beimang ding a, milim a biakna uh mun khempeuh kisusia ding hi. Tua ahih manin a biakna taute uh leh a milimte uh vutlevai suakin, a paknamtui taute uh kisatvui gawp ding ahih manin, milim biakna dingin a bawlsa khempeuh uh maimang ding hi
Mun citengah mi kithatlum ding a, a suakta sunsunte in kei pen Topa ka hih lamtak hong phawk ding uh hi
“Tua banga kihonthahna panin pawlkhat ka suaktasak ding a, minam dangte lakah kithehthangin

salin a om ding uh hi. Tua bangin salin a omna uh mun panin, amau' lungsim cihtaklohna uh hangin kei hong nusiatna uh leh keimah sangin milim a deihzawkna uh hangin a maizumna dingun gim a pia ding ka hih lamtak thei-in kei hong phawk ding uh hi. Amau' gitlohna leh a haitatnasate uh hangin amau mahmah kimudahtawm ding uh hi
Tua ciangin kei pen Topa ka hih lamtak hong thei ding uh a, amaute gimpiak ding ka genkholhnate a mawkpau ka hihlohlam a phawk ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Israel mite' gitlohna leh a muhdahhuai a gamtatnate khempeuh uh hangin na khut singin lei tuan in la, a dahin kap in. Amaute galkidona, kial, leh natna hangin si ding uh hi
A gamla-a om mite cina-in si ding uh a, a nai-a omte galsungah si ding uh hi. A omlai sunte gilkialin puksi ding uh hi. Amaute in keima hehna thuak ding uh hi

Milimte' lak leh biakna tau kiimah si luanghawm kithehthang ding a, mual sang tungteng, mual dawnzangteng, singnim nuai citeng, tawsaw kung lian nuai khempeuh, leh milim biakna-in paknamtui a halna uh mun khempeuhah si luanghawm om ziazua kawikawi ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi

Keimah in ka khut zanin a gam khempeuh uh ka susia ding hi. Leitaw lam sehnel gam pana kipanin leilu lam Riblah khuapi dongin, Israel mite' omna mun khempeuh, sit neiloin ka vatmai ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi.
